info.name: TClinic API Collection
info.description:
Complete API test collection for TClinic - Clinic Management System

## Roles:
- Admin: Full access
- Doctor: Medical staff
- Patient: Customers

## Setup:
1. Import this collection
2. Import the environment file
3. Run "Login Admin" first to get token
4. Other requests will auto-use the token

request.description: Login with admin credentials. Token is auto-saved to environment.
